prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 4A-GE 'Bigport' (4A-GELU, 20V, 1600cc) with a TODA Racing Stage 3 stroker kit (86mm crank, 86mm pistons, 12.5:1 compression) and TODA Racing Type-R camshafts (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Fujitsubo and a HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 60mm piping

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) on a custom cast manifold by Tomei, with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (500x200x76mm core) and a custom 3-inch aluminum intake piping system with a K&N cone filter (part #69-3530TP)

Custom ECU tuning via a Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder fuel control, sequential ignition, and launch control, paired with a set of Denso Iridium IK22 spark plugs and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with an Aeromotive FPR (part #13101) and -6AN braided lines
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny P-ATF01 widebody kit (fiberglass) with custom 2-inch extended wheel arches, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon and a custom aluminum rear diffuser by Veilside

Custom 15x8.5-inch SSR MK3 wheels (ET+15, 4x100 PCD) with 185/55R15 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, paired with a custom bolt-on fender flares by Garage Vary and a custom rear ducktail spoiler by J's Racing

Full interior retrim with Bride Zeta III seats (custom red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with custom carbon fiber door cards by Varis
